title: Vitha Vithama Soap Seeppu Kannadi Lyrics Kaadhale Nimmadhi
stanzas: <div>Vitha Vithama Soap Seeppu Kannadi Lyrics Kaadhale Nimmadhi

Vidha vidhamaa
soapu seeppu kannaadi
en akkaa maga vandhu
ninnaa munnaadi

en akkaa ponnu anjala
naan vachchen paaru nenjula
naanga rendu perum pinjula
ada engayum poyi konjala

Vidha vidhamaa
soapu seeppu kannaadi
en akkaa maga vandhu
ninnaa munnaadi

oru naal margazhi maasam
kaalangaathaala ava
veettu munnaala

kaalaiyil ezhundhu
kolam podugaiyila
kadhula soundu kaettu
naanum ezhundhenda

ava enna paaththaa
naan avala paaththen
kannum kannum muttikichu
kadhal vandhu ottikichu

Chennai Managarile
south usman roatile
lalitha jewellariyil
neclace vaangi thandha
bagavan kadaiyila
cut piece-u vangithandhen
kannula alaveduthu
jocketu vaangithandhen
devi theatrela
kadhal kottai padam paarthen

ava enna thotta
naan avala thodala
kannum kannum muttikichu
kadhal vandhu ottikichu

Vidha vidhamaa
soapu seeppu kannaadi
en akkaa maga vandhu
ninnaa munnaadi

en akkaa ponnu anjala
naan vachchen paaru nenjula
naanga rendu perum pinjula
ada engayum poyi konjala

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, portraying the emotional connection between two individuals.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Kaadhale Nimmadhi.

Who is the singer of this song?

The singer of this song is Deva.

What year was this song released?

This song was released in 1998.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vitha Vithama Soap Seeppu Kannadi, the lyrics beautifully encapsulate the feelings of love and nostalgia, making it a perfect romantic ballad. The song reflects the emotional journey of the characters in Kaadhale Nimmadhi, highlighting their deep connection. With its soothing melody, it evokes a sense of longing and warmth, resonating with anyone who has cherished moments of love. This classic piece remains a beloved favorite among fans of Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vitha Vithama Soap Seeppu Kannadi from Kaadhale Nimmadhi is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With its enchanting lyrics and soothing tune, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the beauty of romance. Dive into this classic and let the magic of Deva's composition sweep you off your feet!
stanzaMeanings: Is it really a soap opera? My sister came in front of you.
Love is always like a mirror; the one who looks at it never breaks it.
I have kept my sister's daughter safe; look, we both are together, and we will go anywhere.
Daavu daavu daavudaa daavillaatti die-u daa.
Is it really a soap opera? My sister came in front of you.
One day in the Margazhi month, she was in front of her house.
Waking up in the morning, I put the kolam; I heard the sound in my heart, and I woke up.
I woke up and opened the window; I saw a little girl with beautiful eyes.
What did she see? I saw her, and love came and captured my heart.
Daavu daavu daavudaa daavillaatti die-u daa.
In Chennai city, I bought a necklace from Lalitha Jewellers and got a cut piece from the shop; I bought a jacket from Devi Theatre after watching a love movie.
What did she touch? I saw her, and love came and captured my heart.
Daavu daavu daavudaa daavillaatti die-u daa.
Is it really a soap opera? My sister came in front of you.
Love is always like a mirror; the one who looks at it never breaks it.
I have kept my sister's daughter safe; look, we both are together, and we will go anywhere.
Daavu daavu daavudaa daavillaatti die-u daa.
